RouteExtensionMethodsHandleGet Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Overload List
  NameDescription
HandleGetT(IMethodRoute, FuncIRequest, TaskT)
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP GET request that returns JSON data.
HandleGetT(IMethodRoute, FuncIRequest, T)
Defines a synchronous handler for an HTTP GET request that returns JSON data.
HandleGetT(IMethodRoute, FuncIRequest, CancellationToken, TaskT)
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP GET request and returns JSON data.
HandleGet(IMethodRoute, IResponseBuilderSelector, Type)
Defines a generic GET handler for an HTTP request.
